articles.title: New attack turned Microsoft 365 Copilot into 1-click data theft tool - BleepingComputer
articles.description: A critical vulnerability chain dubbed SearchLeak in Microsoft 365 Copilot Enterprise could allow attackers to steal sensitive data from a target's mailbox, OneDrive, or SharePoint account through a specially crafted URL.

articles.title: 'Staggering' pristine copy of legendary game sells for record-breaking millions - Polygon.com
articles.description: There aren't many NES games in such a pristine condition, which is one of the few reasons this SMB cartridge just broke a huge record

articles.title: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation Is Bringing Back the Airship Dream - IGN
articles.description: By putting you back in the pilot seat and letting you command the Highwind, Final Fantasy 7 Revelation is finally bringing back the airship dream.

articles.title: Nintendo's latest Direct was reportedly 2026's most-watched Summer Game Fest showcase, and Zelda: Ocarina of Time's remake was the most-viewed trailer - Eurogamer
articles.description: Geoff Keighley's main Summer Game Fest showcase reportedly had a peak of 3.7 million viewers.
